samples.xml_description:
Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. Clock input Active low reset signal Enable signal for addition operation 64-bit input operand A 64-bit input operand B 65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb. Output enable signal. Pipeline stage parameter

For pipeline stages

Register adda_reg_0 to store the input value adda.

Register addb_reg_0 to store the input value addb.

Register i_en_reg_0 to store the input value i_en.

Register sum_reg_0 to store the result of the addition.

Register cout_reg_0 to store the carry out value.

Register o_en_reg_0 to store the output enable value.

For pipeline stages

Register adda_reg_1 to store the input value adda.

Register addb_reg_1 to store the input value addb.

Register i_en_reg_1 to store the input value i_en.

Register sum_reg_1 to store the result of the addition.

Register cout_reg_1 to store the carry out value.

Register o_en_reg_1 to store the output enable value.
